name: FORGE — LinkedIn Content Autopilot
description: Takes a content brief via webhook, generates a LinkedIn post with Claude, and schedules it via Buffer or posts directly.

setup.import_instructions: Import this file into n8n via Workflows > Import from file. Then activate the webhook trigger and configure credentials.

nodes.name: Content Brief Received
nodes.description: Receives content brief: { topic, angle, audience, key_insight, cta, tone, length }
